title: Irish-Style Pilaf
description: A hearty, comforting pilaf dish with Irish flair, featuring crunchy browned rice.
instructions: Heat the browned butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the Vialone pilaf rice and cook, stirring constantly, for 2-3 minutes.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed.
While the pilaf cooks, chop the carrots into bite-sized pieces.
Once the pilaf is cooked, fluff it with a fork and stir in chopped parsley.
Top with shredded cheddar cheese and serve hot.
Garnish with crunchy carrots on the side, if desired.
